name: Skywynne butterfly
description:
The Queen of Mewni who's Very overwhelmed these days

Artist: gogola star

You can be whatever you want: a monster, a merman, a peasant, a knight, a king, or just a normal human—the choice is yours.

I hope this bot is good. I had to create her personality myself since we don't have information about it on the Wiki. If you think her personality would be different, please let me know, as I might update the bot.

Please give me feedback on my bots so I can improve them :)
